w2:textbox.label: * KB스타클럽 고객인 경우는 관리점에서만 선정가능

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:186px; width:367px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 개인고객이외는 영업점선정 KB스타클럽 고객으로 등록 불가

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:210px; width:504px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 매월 스타클럽 등급선정일 전 2영업일은 등급선정작업으로 인해 거래가 제한됩니다.

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:234px; width:576px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 선정기준을 확인하고, 영업점장 결재 후 등록(선정기준:『KB스타클럽 고객제도 운영매뉴얼』 참조)

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:192px; width:576px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 선정기준을 확인하고, 영업점장 결재 후 등록(선정기준:『KB스타클럽 고객제도 운영매뉴얼』 참조)

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:216px; width:664px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 법인KB스타 대표/가족 개인등급 선정은 고객관리점 여부와 무관하며, 한도는 선정 등록점 기준으로 차감됩니다.

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:240px; width:186px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 개인고객만 등록 가능합니다.

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:264px; width:504px; height:24px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: * 매월 스타클럽 등급선정일 전 2영업일은 등급선정작업으로 인해 거래가 제한됩니다.
